title: PhD Program in Speech and Language Disorders Therapy Application and Fees
content:
PhD Program in Speech and Language Disorders Therapy Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application start date: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 18, 2026

SCIENCE EXAM:

Date: Tuesday, January 20, 2026

Exam Location: Üsküdar University Health Campus ÜSESKOM Council Room

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Dates: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Dates: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

NUMERIC (NUM)

Dear candidate students;

In the 2025-2026 Spring Semester, a face-to-face science exam will be held in Doctoral Programs;

Candidates will receive 50% of their numerical ALES score, 30% of the science exam, and 20% of the undergraduate (and/or) graduate grade point average.

Original or certified copy of Master's diploma

Original or certified copy of Master's transcript (transcript)

ALES exam result document

Copy of identity card

Photo (2 Pieces)

Click to Download Foreign Language Exams Equivalency Document

SPECIAL CONDITIONS FOR CANDIDATES

Only candidates with undergraduate and graduate degrees in Speech and Language Therapy can apply to the Ph.D. Program.

Speech and Language Therapy (Thesis) Master's Degree (*)

Having received 55 or more points from YDS and an equivalent exam.

Graduate graduation grade point averages must be at least 2.5 out of 4 coefficients.

(*) Candidates enrolled in the Speech and Language Therapy Master's Program before 06 February 2013 will be accepted regardless of thesis and non-thesis distinction.

In addition, graduates of Audiology/Hearing and Speech Disorders with thesis who registered before 06 February 2016 can also apply.

At least 55 points from the numerical score type.

TUITION FEE:
